analysis.addStyle: Add style descriptions like realistic, anime
analysis.promptTooLong: Prompt is too long, may exceed model limits
analysis.promptTooShort: Prompt is too short, lacks sufficient information
analysis.simplifyDescription: Simplify description and highlight key points
analysis.videoMissingAction: Video prompt is missing action descriptions
analysis.videoNeedsAction: Video prompts should include action descriptions

prompt.principle4Image: Image prompts should focus on composition, lighting and detail
prompt.principle4Video: Video prompts should include clear action descriptions and time sequences
